holdings.infoBox: IMCG is an equity ETF with a total of 272 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 3.63%, Marvell Technology at 3.35%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 3.16%, Western Digital at 2.00%, and Corning at 1.75%.

overview.description: The iShares Morningstar Mid-Cap Growth ETF (IMCG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of US mid-cap stocks companies selected based on their growth characteristics. IMCG was launched on Jun 28, 2004 and is issued by BlackRock.
